ground_truth.title: Birdbuddy Pro
ground_truth.main_content:
Our award-winning Smart Bird Feeder, reimagined.

Stunning HD photos & videos

Capture crystal-clear close-ups of birds with our next-generation camera. Now with an expanded field of view and slow-motion video.

Capture every detail

- 2K video quality, 5MP Photos
- 1/2.7" sensor with excellent low-light performance
- High Dynamic Range (HDR)
- Sharp focus at close distance
- Wider Field of View
- Slow Motion Video

High Dynamic Range

The larger camera sensor balances bright and shadowy areas in high-contrast scenes, creating clearer images when birds are backlit or in patchy sunlight through trees.

Smooth slow motion

The camera's capability to record at high frame rates is perfect for slow-motion playback of split-second movements and behaviors.

Improved focus range

The enhanced focus range captures sharp close-ups, ideal for revealing every bird's fine details and subtle traits.

Wider field of view

The extended FOV lets you capture images and videos of multiple birds and their interactions around your feeder in a single frame.

Better low-light performance

Whether it's early morning or late evening, the improved sensor reduces noise and captures more light, resulting in clear images during those active birdwatching times.

What makes it smart

Bird Species Recognition

Wonder who's at your feeder? Our smart recognition tells you exactly which species stopped by, using AI trained on real bird visits.

Name That Bird

Noticed a bird returning again and again? Give it a unique name, track its visits, and create a special bond.

Bird Care

Receive alerts about sick birds at your feeder and get tips to prevent the spread of disease.

Pet Alert

Get notified when cats or other pets are near your feeder, so you can keep your feathered visitors safe.

Enjoy the beauty of nature

Invite your loved ones

Share the beauty of nature with up to 10 family members and friends.

Visit world's most exciting feeders

Access our global network of feeders in prime birding locations.

Participate in bird conservation

Every photo helps build a database for researchers to track bird populations and migration, fostering biodiversity right in your own backyard.

Awarded bird-friendly design

The smart bird feeder is designed with our feathered friends in mind and can be customized with a variety of add-ons.

- Recyclable plastic housing
- Designed for birds' safety
- Weather-resistant
- Lightweight

One camera, multiple housings

Each Birdbuddy housing fits the Nature Cam PRO, whether it's a Bird Feeder, Hummingbird Feeder, or Bird Bath.

What's in the box?

- 1x AI-Powered Camera
- 1x Bird Feeder
- 1x USB-C Charging Cable
- 1x Metal Hanger
- 1x Seed Scoop
- 1x Universal Mount and Screws
- Free Birdbuddy App
